assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with columns Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path. Row 1: 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend'. Row 2: 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' section states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and provides an example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), making it a subsection of Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-12: 'Two Serena MCP server instances were discovered by scanning for tools matching the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern: 1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__` (10 tools...) 2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__` (10 tools...)'. Source on line 5: 'MCP tools listing from `mcp-tools-with-serena.md`'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 34-40 indicate that existing content WAS preserved: 'All existing content from the original CLAUDE.md was preserved unchanged: # my-project heading and description, ## Documentation section, ## Getting Started section'. While the Project Configuration section was entirely new (lines 15-30: 'A complete # Project Configuration section was generated with three subsections'), the changes-log documents preserved entries from the original CLAUDE.md, contradicting the assertion that there are 'no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup'.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path -- matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' -- the table header contains exactly the four columns specified: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path.
